title: genista hispanica subsp. occidentalis
intro: Genista hispanica subsp. occidentalis, also known as the Western Spanish broom or Spanish broom, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It is a spiny shrub native to Western Europe and North Africa, used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as being used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin conditions. Genista hispanica subsp. occidentalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being.
